all.title: Canada wildfire smoke blankets US skies across the Midwest and Northeast, triggering health alerts
all.description: Air quality levels are forecast to drop to unhealthy levels across the U.S. Midwest and Northeast on Tuesday as smoke from Canadian wildfires intensifies. AirNow’s Fire and Smoke Map showed the regions blanketed in yellow due to the drifting smoke. Winds from the northwest are pushing smoke into the region, with National Weather Service forecasters […]

all.title: Open fire and campfire bans coming into effect in B.C. amid dry lightning threat
all.description: Several open fire bans, including campfire prohibitions, are coming into effect over the next two days in parts of British Columbia as crews prepare for the threat of new blazes.

all.title: 1 woman’s death, another’s serious injury prompts e-scooter warning from Vancouver police
all.description: This warning from the Vancouver Police Department comes after a woman died and another woman was seriously injured in separate incidents over the weekend.
